response.justification: Bogdan's resume demonstrates extensive experience in software development across multiple domains and technologies, but it lacks the specific mandatory technical skills for the C++ Developer role in capital markets. While he has significant C++ experience (e.g., National Instruments, embedded systems), most recent roles emphasize JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and other languages, with no evidence of recent Windows-based C++ development, SQL Server/Oracle, or financial domain expertise. His background does not align with the core requirements of the role.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship and mentorship experience (e.g., workshops, TDD, CI/CD)
Proven ability to work in high-performance environments (e.g., Meta, Dunnhumby)
Diverse technical background with expertise in multiple languages and platforms
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ development on Windows platform (mandatory requirement)
No clear experience with SQL Server or Oracle (mandatory requirement)
No evidence of fixed income, investment banking, or capital markets domain knowledge
